action.reasoning: Observation: First iteration, no baseline yet. Analysis: ClimSim is well-suited for MLPs with skip connections; large dataset means need efficient training with big batch sizes. Decision: Build ResNet-MLP, train 3 epochs quickly, submit eval to measure baseline R² and iteration time.
